EPA141A

  • Schedule
  • Lectures
  • 🐍 Software Installation
    • Graphical Installation (Anaconda Navigator)
    • Command-Line Installation
  • 🔬 Labs
    • Lab 1 — Exploratory Modelling with the Lake Problem
    • Lab 2 — Global Sensitivity Analysis
    • Lab 3 — Scenario Discovery: PRIM and Dimensional Stacking
    • Lab 4 — MOEA Setup and Optimisation
    • Lab 5 — Pareto Analysis, Visualisation, and Convergence
    • Lab 6 — Multi-Objective Robust Decision Making (MORDM)
  • 📝 Assignments
    • Assignment 1 — Exploratory Modeling with JUSTICE
    • Assignment 2 — Sensitivity Analysis: Which Inputs Matter?
    • Assignment 3 — Scenario Discovery: When Do Policies Fail?
    • Assignment 4 — Problem Formulation
    • Assignment 5 — Many-Objective Optimisation (Local Run)
    • Assignment 6 — MOEA Convergence
    • Assignment 7 — Pareto Visualisation
    • Assignment 8 — Robustness Analysis
  • Debate Instructions
    • Debate Stages
    • Actor Constellation

📚 Resources

📚 Resources#

Key textbook#

  • Marchau, V. A. W. J., Walker, W. E., Bloemen, P. J. T. M., & Popper, S. W. (Eds.). (2019). Decision Making under Deep Uncertainty: From Theory to Practice. Springer. Open access PDF

Core papers#

Topic

Reference

EMA & MBDM overview

Kwakkel, J. H., & Pruyt, E. (2013). Exploratory modelling and analysis, an approach for model-based foresight under deep uncertainty. Technological Forecasting and Social Change, 80(3), 419–431.

Sobol sensitivity analysis

Saltelli, A., et al. (2010). Variance based sensitivity analysis of model output. Design and estimator for the total sensitivity index. Computer Physics Communications, 181(2), 259–270.

PRIM scenario discovery

Bryant, B. P., & Lempert, R. J. (2010). Thinking inside the box: A participatory, computer-assisted approach to scenario discovery. Technological Forecasting and Social Change, 77(1), 34–49.

MORDM

Kasprzyk, J. R., et al. (2013). Many objective robust decision making for complex environmental systems undergoing change. Environmental Modelling & Software, 42, 55–71.

Lake Problem (DPS)

Quinn, J. D., Reed, P. M., & Keller, K. (2017). Direct policy search for robust multi-objective management of deeply uncertain socio-ecological tipping points. Environmental Modelling & Software, 92, 125–141.

FaIR climate model

Millar, R. J., et al. (2017). Emission budgets and pathways consistent with limiting warming to 1.5 °C. Nature Geoscience, 10, 741–747.

Kalkuhl damage function

Kalkuhl, M., & Wenz, L. (2020). The impact of climate conditions on economic production. Evidence from a global panel of regions. Journal of Environmental Economics and Management, 103, 102360.
